source_url_reference: https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/ctryprem.html (July 2026 semiannual country ERP update; US ERP 4.45%, mature market ERP 4.17% per workbook)
notes: ERP is a curated assumption, not objective market data. US value from Damodaran July 2026 country risk premium update (implied ERP methodology). Operator verified and approved on 2026-07-09 (chat approval) against Damodaran July 2026 update. Romania intentionally omitted until the operator transcribes the RO entry from the same July 2026 workbook; do not estimate it. Expiry aligned with the next semiannual Damodaran update (January 2027). Not investment advice.

US.source_note: Damodaran July 2026 workbook: US equity risk premium 4.45%; mature market ERP 4.17%
